g.text: Two small indexes + one huge blob store. Layers are keyed by sha256, so identical bytes are stored once — across all images, all teams.
key = sha256(layer tar) → bytes. ONE copy per unique content, globally.
Naive storage = 3 images × ~140 MB ≈ 415 MB. Dedup storage = 201 MB. Saved ≈ 214 MB (51%).
Badge ×N at bottom-right of a blob = referenced by N images. Stored once regardless.
